rationale: The response fabricates non-existent Mathlib modules and tactics (RolleAxiomatised, Mathlib.Tactic.GhostFunction) and invented handbooks (lean-zen-mode-handbook.md, lean-mvt-deep-dive.md), triggering the Score 1 'made-up Lean APIs / Mathlib lemmas' criterion.
rubric_evidence: `Mathlib.Analysis.Calculus.RolleAxiomatised` — the axiomatised variant of Rolle's theorem that this module builds on.
`Mathlib.Tactic.GhostFunction` — the tactic for closing derivative-symbol-elimination goals.
`lean-zen-mode-handbook.md` — for the meditative single-step proof methodology covered in §3.
